hooks.command: git fetch origin main --quiet 2>$null; $behind = try { [int]((git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count 2>$null).Trim()) } catch { 0 }; if ($behind -gt 0) { Write-Output ('{"systemMessage":"[AVISO] Ha ' + $behind + ' commit(s) novo(s) no GitHub que voce nao baixou ainda. Execute: git pull origin main"}') }
